project.name: client-common-concatenation
project.description: This file is used to concat all the JS files in a directory to a single JS file

property.description: This file contains a list of Files to be concatened. is must also hold the property dest.file which is a path relative to the basedir

then.echo: Stripping all files of stripjavacomments, striplinecomments and changing tabstospaces and ignoreblank then changing all multiple whitespace entries to single whitespace entries. All code must end with a semi-colon (;) creating dest.file: ${dest.file}
